vertical_split_selection.sort_order: descending by non_pk_column_count, then table name

base_predicate_sqls: ((("Score" IS NOT NULL AND "Score" > 0 AND "Score" <= 0) OR ("Score" IS NOT NULL AND "Score" > 0 AND "Score" <= 0)) OR ("Score" > 0 OR "Score" IS NULL))
fragment_roles: rows where 0 < Score <= 0 + rows where 0 < Score <= 0 + rows where Score > 0 or is NULL
comments.fragment_role_B: rows where 0 < Score <= 0 + rows where 0 < Score <= 0 + rows where Score > 0 or is NULL

base_predicate_sqls: ((("Comment" = 'edited title' OR "Comment" = 'edited tags') OR (("Comment" = 'edited body' OR ("Comment" = 'added 2 characters in body' OR "Comment" = 'edited tags; edited title')) OR ("Comment" = 'added 1 characters in body' OR ("Comment" = 'deleted 1 characters in body' OR "Comment" = 'added 4 characters in body')))) OR ("Comment" IS NULL OR "Comment" NOT IN ('', 'edited title', 'edited tags', 'edited body', 'added 1 characters in body', 'added 2 characters in body', 'edited tags; edited title', 'deleted 1 characters in body', 'added 4 characters in body')))
fragment_roles: rows where Comment = edited title + rows where Comment = edited tags + rows where Comment = edited body + rows where Comment = added 2 characters in body + rows where Comment = edited tags; edited title + rows where Comment = added 1 characters in body + rows where Comment = deleted 1 characters in body + rows where Comment = added 4 characters in body + rows where Comment is NULL or not in {'', 'edited title', 'edited tags', 'edited body', 'added 1 characters in body', 'added 2 characters in body', 'edited tags; edited title', 'deleted 1 characters in body', 'added 4 characters in body'} (catch-all 'OTHER' bucket)
postHistory||vfrag=comment.fragment_role_B: rows where Comment = edited title + rows where Comment = edited tags + rows where Comment = edited body + rows where Comment = added 2 characters in body + rows where Comment = edited tags; edited title + rows where Comment = added 1 characters in body + rows where Comment = deleted 1 characters in body + rows where Comment = added 4 characters in body + rows where Comment is NULL or not in {'', 'edited title', 'edited tags', 'edited body', 'added 1 characters in body', 'added 2 characters in body', 'edited tags; edited title', 'deleted 1 characters in body', 'added 4 characters in body'} (catch-all 'OTHER' bucket)

base_predicate_sqls: (("AnswerCount" IS NOT NULL AND "AnswerCount" > 0 AND "AnswerCount" <= 1) OR ("AnswerCount" IS NOT NULL AND "AnswerCount" > 1 AND "AnswerCount" <= 2))
fragment_roles: rows where 0 < AnswerCount <= 1 + rows where 1 < AnswerCount <= 2
rows where AnswerCount > 2 or is NULL
posts||vfrag=answercount.fragment_role_B: rows where 0 < AnswerCount <= 1 + rows where 1 < AnswerCount <= 2

fragment_roles: rows where Count > 87 or is NULL

base_predicate_sqls: ((("UpVotes" IS NOT NULL AND "UpVotes" > 0 AND "UpVotes" <= 0) OR ("UpVotes" IS NOT NULL AND "UpVotes" > 0 AND "UpVotes" <= 0)) OR ("UpVotes" > 0 OR "UpVotes" IS NULL))
fragment_roles: rows where 0 < UpVotes <= 0 + rows where 0 < UpVotes <= 0 + rows where UpVotes > 0 or is NULL
users||vfrag=downvotes.fragment_role_B: rows where 0 < UpVotes <= 0 + rows where 0 < UpVotes <= 0 + rows where UpVotes > 0 or is NULL

fragment_roles: rows where CreationDate > 2011-02-25 or is NULL

justification.cross_local_query_count_interpretation: Distinct cross-local workload queries where this fragment pair (different original tables) co-occurs; not an estimate of single-local queries after relocation.

relocation_engine_debug.pair_weight_meaning: Weights count co-occurrences of two fragments (from different original tables) inside workload queries that already span 2+ locals. They rank relocation candidates; they do not equal the number of queries that will become single-local after a move.
